text:
The schedule appears to be thinning out quite significantly for the Irish at this stage, although Day 12 will see Jack Woolley and a host of Irish track athletes make their bows at these Games.

The women's singles golf tournament also kicks off today with Irish interest inLeona MaguireandStephanie Meadow.

Meadow will be among the first out on course at 8am, with Maguire due to tee off around 11.17am.

Rhasidat Adelekeis set to run in the first of the women’s 400m semi-finals. She is the only Irish athlete to make it through to the semis after her team-mates Sharlene Mawdsley and Sophie Becker failed to come through the heats and repechage.

However, before that,Sarah Lavinwill be the first Irish athlete out on the track to compete for a place in the women’s 100m hurdles.

Brian Faywill then go in the heats of the men’s 5,000m, followed shortly after that byMark Englishin the men’s 800m.

Sophie O’SullivanandSarah Healywill run in the women’s 1,500m repechageafter both failed to qualify from their heats yesterday.

Fans will be hoping to seeJack Woolley’s trademark scorpion kick when he faces Gashim Magomedov in the men’s 58kg taekwondo round of 16.

He’ll be aiming to progress to the quarter-final later in the afternoon before the tournament progresses to the latter stages.

The medal race in the sailing is also taking place with Finn Lynch hoping for a strong finish. He can't come away with a medal.

(In order of start time)

0800-1700Women's singles: Leona Maguire and Stephanie Meadow

Stephanie Meadowtee-time 0800with Perrine Delacour of France and Manon De Roey of Belgium.

Leona Maguiretee-time 1117with Georgia Hall of Great Britain and Ashleigh Buhai of South Africa.

0915-0948Women's 100m hurdles, Round 1 heats: Sarah Lavin (Heat 4)

1010-1045Men’s 5,000m, Round 1 heats: Brian Fay (Heat 2)

1055-1137Men’s 800m, Round 1 heats: Mark English (Heat 2)

1145-1202Women’s 1,500m repechage: Sophie O’Sullivan (Heat 1) and Sarah Healy (Heat 2)

1945-2002Women's 400m semi-finals: Rhasidat Adeleke (semi-final1)

1210Men's Dinghy medal race: Finn Lynch - Delayed

1048-2055Men's 58kg: Jack Woolley

Round 16 v Gashim Magomedov1048-1100

Quarter-final at1432if qualified.

Semi-final at1602if qualified.

Repechage at1830-1919if applicable.

Bronze medal contest at1919-2022if qualified.

Final at2037-2055if qualified.
